items.headline: Church of the Cross ice cream social
items.summary: Church of the Cross is inviting the public for homemade ice cream from 4 to 7 p.m. on Thursday, July 16, at Church of the Cross.

items.headline: Snapchat messages preceded deadly shooting by a former police officer: Court records
items.summary: Caitlynn J. Girkin, a former Creve Coeur police officer, faces up to 60 years in prison for allegedly shooting her roommate Adolfo Cazares in March.

items.headline: Christ United Methodist Women of Faith annual Seasons of Fun Luncheon
items.summary: Luncheon features creative tabletops with themes chosen by each table hostess. Doors open at 11 a.m. for table viewing with lunch being served at noon.
